blocks.text: Barça vs Atlético Could Decide La Liga — A Massive Saturday Awaits

Barcelona lead Real Madrid by 4 points with a game in hand. A win at the Metropolitano tightens their grip on the title. Real Madrid kick off first away at Mallorca — the pressure is on before kick-off in Madrid.
⛳ Valero Texas Open — Robert MacIntyre leads at -14, with Ventura & Reitan chasing in this Masters warm-up
🎾 Monte-Carlo Masters — Casper Ruud hunts clay-court glory in prime Roland Garros prep territory
